items.title: Beware of banks breaking bad, warns top B. of A. strategist. He casts a wary eye on bank-loan ETFs.
items.description: Problem loans in the financial-services sector imply mounting risks for markets.

items.title: My grandpa retired happily at 70 with $750K after working as a missionary. I know where most Americans go wrong.
items.description: “You could even retire at 55 with $500,000 and be perfectly fine. Am I right?”

items.title: Howard Marks of Oaktree makes 180-degree turn on AI after Claude tutorial. Here’s how he suggests investors approach it.

items.title: Nine out of 10 bets this fund manager made over the past year have outperformed. These are his next two plays.
items.description: Gold miners, Japan stocks and nuclear plays boosted Man Group’s portfolio

items.title: After 46 years working, I’m not retiring — instead, I take a vacation every month. Is that a good life in your 70s?
items.description: “I’ve owned my own company for the last 15 years. It’s worth $8.5 million.”
